headline: CPChem names new chief financial officer
summary: THE WOODLANDS, Texas, July 22, 2026--Chevron Phillips Chemical today announced the appointment of Wayne Borduin as executive vice president and chief financial officer, effective Sept. 1. He will report to Steve Prusak, president and CEO, and oversee the company’s finance and procurement organizations. Borduin will succeed Darren Ercolani, who is retiring from the company after more than 30 years of service with CPChem and Phillips Petroleum (now Phillips 66).

headline: Phillips 66: Double Downgrade To Sell - The Peak Is In
summary: Phillips 66 has rallied 62% YTD, driven by robust refining EBITDA growth and high U.S. refinery utilization. Learn more about PSX stock here.

headline: $100 Invested In Phillips 66 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) has outperformed the market over the past 5 years by 12.43% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 23.67%. Currently, Phillips 66 has a market capitalization of $86.46
